positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a leaping golden retriever silhouetted against a vibrant, ethereal sunset sky. The dog is captured in a dynamic, joyful leap, emphasizing motion and grace. The composition must be centered and balanced, designed for apparel printing. Use high contrast, clean lines, and a limited color palette of burnt orange, deep indigo, and golden yellow. The style should be a blend of graphic design and watercolor wash, giving a clean, sticker-like print quality. Perfect for screen printing on fabric. Dramatic lighting, vector art quality, crisp edges, negative space is integral.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, text, logo, signature, grain, noise, messy, poorly drawn, cartoon, photorealism
